description: Token saver dry-diff schema for observe-only mode. Real outbound must remain unchanged; after.json is simulated only.

fieldNotes.messageCount: Total logical message count seen by token-saver snapshot for this send.
fieldNotes.roles: Ordered role list for all logical messages considered in the snapshot.
fieldNotes.recentThreeRoles: Ordered roles for the most recent three logical messages.
fieldNotes.toolCallIds: Ordered tool_call_id list when available; empty array when none are present or not observable.
fieldNotes.systemMessageRewritten: Boolean flag indicating whether the effective system prompt was structurally rewritten.
fieldNotes.userPayload: Visible user payload summary before any simulated compression.
fieldNotes.contextEnvelope: Context payload summary before simulated compression.
fieldNotes.outboundMessage: Simulated outbound payload summary after token-saver logic.
fieldNotes.extraSystemPrompt: Effective extra system prompt summary after token-saver logic.
